title: Parallax sanctioned review-budget amendment (v0.38 5.2, gates A3/A5)
description: One record per human-approved widening of the freeze-time-frozen [review] budget, committed at .parallax/<slug>/amendments/BA-<n>.json and written only by `scripts/contract-amend.py record-budget`. This is the ONLY sanctioned way the round budget in force may change after freeze: the chain starts at review-policy.frozen.json's policy_hash and each link is prev_policy_hash -> new_policy_hash with a machine-minted grant_token the human explicitly repeated. A post-freeze `codex.toml` edit is NOT a link and changes no gate verdict (the RUN1 sed-edit that cleared a rounds-exceeded HOLD is exactly what this unrepresents). Distinct from contract amendments (parallax-contract-amendment-v1): this chain rides over policy_hash, never over contract bytes, so the v0.37 P0.4 'only mechanical-tightening touches the contract' boundary is untouched.

kind.description: The only kind this schema sanctions. Contract changes go through the mechanical-tightening chain; product forks through /parallax:resolve.

rationale.description: Why the extra round(s) are legitimate — e.g. a real safety finding needed a genuine additional verifier round (the RUN1 S3 MEDIA_ROOT case), not churn.

evidence.description: Citations proving the widening is for real work: finding ids, verifier round artifacts, commits.

prev_policy_hash.description: The triage-canonical policy_hash the amendment widens FROM (pinned snapshot, or the previous amendment's new_policy_hash).

new_policy_hash.description: The triage-canonical hash of new_policy — recomputed and cross-checked by every consumer, so it cannot be stated falsely.

grant_token.description: Machine-minted (budget_chain.expected_token) and fully derivable from this record's own slug/id/prev/new — the human authorizes by repeating it exactly; a token that doesn't match its record fails closed.
